ew_context: Price breaking above Ichimoku cloud resistance suggesting potential impulse wave initiation - wave 1 or 3 of larger degree structure
pattern_desc: Clean breakout above Ichimoku cloud top at 91.11 with price clearing Kijun at 91.09. Strong momentum alignment despite bearish EMA backdrop.
invalidation: Close back below cloud top at 91.11 on M15 timeframe negates bullish breakout
market_context: Iran tensions and US maritime trade restrictions creating supply concerns, supporting oil prices despite broader risk-off sentiment
